default-settings.setting: International Reference Alphabet (ITU-T T.50 ASCII standard)
Response strings are fully alphanumeric text
Numeric extended error codes are active
Short Data Service operates in raw TETRA PDU mode

command.name: +CME ERROR
command.description: Extended error response codes returned after an issued transaction payload string.

field.label: Error report code
field.value: Mobile terminal completely failed to transmit message over the air layout.
Terminal cannot execute the action under the current cellular state, such as during an active emergency call.
The requested feature or operational mode is disabled in terminal firmware.
Wrong Master Unblocking Key sequence entered.
Terminal requires an active security smart-card module.
Handset interface or smart card is PIN-locked.
Access is blocked after too many wrong entries and now requires a PUK code.
Communication failed while accessing physical SIM memory blocks.
Smart-card processing is already occupied by another internal task.
The terminal rejects the inserted card model or type.
The provided PIN does not match the active code.
The target card is permanently blocked after maximum unblocking attempts.
Internal storage is full, for example the phonebook or flash-backed buffers.
The text payload exceeds the character capacity for the active transmission path.
Illegal payload characters were found during text parsing.
The target address sequence is longer than terminal string buffers permit.
The dial string contains unsupported structural markers.
The device lost network service and is outside usable RF coverage.
Input format error, such as sending literal text where a numeric value is required.
Integer parameters fall outside established bounds.
Malformed line structure or wrong parameter count.
The PDU transmission timed out while waiting for more payload data.
The requested transaction cannot execute while the terminal is in Direct Mode.
Radio hardware is locked in Transmit Inhibit (TXI) state.
The system is busy handling higher-priority internal actions.
The requested dynamic gateway linkage is rejected in Trunked Mode.
The GPS solution pipeline is active but cannot produce a valid coordinate fix.
A remote control sequence was rejected pending security verification.
The internal task watchdog aborted because no handshake completed within 60 seconds.
Challenge verification failed because the response block was wrong.
Too many failed verification attempts require a link power reset.
Hardware buffer initialization failed because memory is blocked or exhausted.
Default code 0000 was rejected and the terminal now enforces a new PIN.

field.label: Reg stat
field.value: Logically disconnected from the local base station topology.
Registered on the home network footprint.
No structural network options are currently available.
Rejected by the core network routing framework.
Registered on a visited or guest network infrastructure.

field.label: LA
field.description: 16-bit target cell Location Area identifier code.

field.label: BS service
field.bit: Cell functions entirely in Local Site Trunking fallback mode and the wide-area infrastructure path is down.
Cell is functioning normally in wide area trunking mode.
Base station supports SNDCP packet data functionality.
Base station enforces Air Interface Encryption.

field.label: Security Information
field.value: Clear mode, with no encryption filters applied.
Static Cipher Key (SCK) encryption is active.
Derived Cipher Key (DCK) or Common Cipher Key (CCK) encryption is active.

command.name: +CSQ
command.description: Received signal strength and bit error diagnostics.

field.label: RSSI
field.value: Worse than the -113 dBm signal floor.
Highly degraded reception near the lower limit.
field.range: Step scale mapping upward in clean 2 dBm increments.
field.value: Optimal reception saturation.
Complete network signal drop or nothing detected.

field.label: BER
field.description: Bit error rate value as reported by the modem.

field.label: Called party identity type
field.value: Short Subscriber Identity.
TETRA Subscriber Identity.
Private Automatic Branch Exchange identity.
Public Switched Telephone Network identity.
Extended TETRA Subscriber Identity.
Manual dial string selection.

field.label: Hook selection
field.value: Simplex or duplex individual signaling flow.
Immediate broadcast or group-call signaling flow.

field.label: Simplex/Duplex setting
field.value: Private target line in duplex mode.
Talkgroup-oriented simplex mode.

field.label: Comms layout structural definition
field.value: Private line connection.
Group talkgroup connection.
Broadcast call topology.

field.label: TxGrant
field.value: Transmission line token granted successfully and the local device can open the microphone.
Transmission request denied by network infrastructure.
Transmission request queued in the base-station scheduler.
Another party currently owns the transmission token; inspect the TPI field to identify the speaker.
Reserved or vendor-specific transmission token state.

field.label: disconnect cause
field.value: Dropped without explicit error parameters; general network failure or hardware state wipeout.
Normal disconnect caused by a manual user or application action.
Destination identity is already occupied in an active voice session.
The intended destination is not acknowledged across the network footprint.
Security handshake mismatch because the remote device lacks the required decryption keys.
The target cell site has reached traffic capacity.
Traffic class or usage restriction violation.
Speech slot or data type assignment processing error.
The serving cell lacks support for this service profile.
Dropped because a higher-priority call, such as an emergency alert, pre-empted the session.
Destination terminal user manually rejected the call.
The session exceeded allowed duration and the network timed it out.
Network infrastructure controller explicitly terminated the session.
Layer-2 confirmation was lost, typically because of packet loss.
Handover or roaming restoration failed during a micro-cell transition.
Destination device rejects clear calls and requires encrypted traffic.
Lost synchronization with the Direct Mode Repeater.
Lost the communication path with a TMO proxy Direct Mode Gateway device.
Gateway parsed the connection parameters but explicitly rejected access.
Base-station controller revoked the talk slot window.
Direct Mode collision because the target channel is busy with other traffic.
Dynamic crypto handshake error due to mismatched key versions or security parameters.
